Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Helgard]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Helgard is a place that can be traveled through via a Gate to reach a Naraka waypoint.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Helgard is a Territory.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Helgard is a Grandmaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — There is a war in Helgard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Helgard is known as the Tower of Winter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Helgard has thirty-two discovered floors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Valin stole the frozen horn from Helgard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — A giant seen on the plateau was probably from Helgard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Helgard is a location mentioned in a stained-glass window depicting an ancient Overlord signing a peace treaty with its natives.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Helgard is associated with certain Travelers and an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Helgard contains a Tower of Winter with dozens of floors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Helgard is a Territory that collects and stores information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Helgard contains formidable guardians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Helgard was seen at the city gates months ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Helgard can summon snow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Helgard has curling horns behind her ears and stands in a small snow flurry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Helgard can freeze objects with a blue hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Helgard is an Incarnation who shows curiosity and resentment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — King Zakareth has kept Helgard with him in reserve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Helgard is a horned woman with blue skin and white fur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Helgard used black ice to create a jagged icicle pointed at Andra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Helgard is an Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Helgard was coming after Leah.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
